name: dual-impl-spike
description: Dual-impl RHI spike (feat-20260511-asset-system-v1 M6 / w17). Uploads a 4x4 RGBA8unorm texture via queue.writeTexture through both @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu and @forgeax/engine-rhi-wgpu, round-trips the pixels through a 256-byte-row-stride padded readback buffer, and asserts byte-exact (ε=0) equality vs the source Uint8Array. Independent of hello-room smoke (ε=0.05) per D-P6. Backs the spike-report metric kind (M6 / w18).

bundle-size.reason: spike harness is a scripts/*.mjs cell (no vite build output); bundle size is tracked at @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu + @forgeax/engine-wgpu-wasm package level per D-P6

fps.reason: static one-shot upload + readback cell; no raf loop or canvas, so fps is not meaningful. Runtime fps coverage stays at apps/hello/triangle (K-12 baseline anchor)

bench.reason: spike exercises ε=0 correctness (byte-exact upload round-trip), not wall-clock performance; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math + pixel-parity fixture

gate.reason: metric 'gate' is reserved for smoke/grep/lockfile binary checks; this spike's binary verdict rides the spike-report kind (D-P6 + AC-19) via report/dual-impl-spike/spike-report.json
